situation: SZ-PP-M-001 from audit-2026-07-07-047: FileReader in ImageUploader.tsx has no onerror handler. If file reading fails (corrupt file, permission issue, disk error), the promise never resolves and the user gets no feedback — silent failure.
action: Added reader.onerror handler that alerts user with the error message. Used case-104 direct worktree commit escape hatch because cp-guard detected existing unmerged SZ-PP-H-001 changes in opt-popup-1783215325.
outcome_evidence: Commit 35f7864 on auto/opt-popup-1783215325 pushed to origin. Adds 3 lines: reader.onerror callback with alert showing reader.error.message.
next_suggestion: Continue shizi popup fixes: SZ-PP-M-002 (MIME type check relies solely on file.type — trivially bypassable)

audit_findings.finding: FileReader has no onerror handler — silent failure on read errors
audit_findings.remediation: Add reader.onerror callback that alerts user with error details
